mapper.select: SELECT s.sponsor_seq ,s.edition_year ,s.tier_cd ,tc.com_cd_nm AS tier_cd_nm ,s.company_name ,s.logo_file_seq ,s.description ,s.representative_remarks ,s.website_url ,s.sort_seq ,s.use_yn ,s.created_by AS rgst_user_seq ,cu.name AS rgst_user_name ,s.created_at AS rgst_date_time ,s.updated_by AS upt_user_seq ,uu.name AS upt_user_name ,s.updated_at AS upt_date_time ,logo.logo_file_dtl_seq ,logo.logo_file_path FROM event.sponsor s LEFT JOIN event.users cu ON cu.user_seq = s.created_by LEFT JOIN event.users uu ON uu.user_seq = s.updated_by LEFT JOIN event.com_cd tc ON tc.com_cd = s.tier_cd AND tc.com_grp_cd_seq = ( SELECT com_grp_cd_seq FROM event.com_grp_cd WHERE com_grp_cd = 'SPONSOR_TIER' ) LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT (ARRAY_AGG(d.file_dtl_seq ORDER BY d.sort_seq ASC, d.file_dtl_seq ASC))[1] AS logo_file_dtl_seq ,(ARRAY_AGG(d.file_path ORDER BY d.sort_seq ASC, d.file_dtl_seq ASC))[1] AS logo_file_path FROM event.tb_file_dtl d WHERE d.file_seq = s.logo_file_seq AND d.del_yn = 'N' ) logo ON TRUE WHERE s.sponsor_seq = #{sponsorSeq} AND s.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT c.com_cd AS code ,c.com_cd_nm AS name ,c.sort_seq AS sort_seq FROM event.com_cd c JOIN event.com_grp_cd g ON g.com_grp_cd_seq = c.com_grp_cd_seq WHERE g.com_grp_cd = 'SPONSOR_TIER' AND c.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY c.sort_seq ASC, c.com_cd ASC
SELECT MAX(edition_year) FROM event.sponsor WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND use_yn = 'Y'
